## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests or QA

## Local-First Check

- [ ] This change does not add telemetry, account requirements, or cloud dependencies to core editing flows.
- [ ] This change does not commit user media, generated exports, logs, reports, or secrets.
- [ ] Any sample media is synthetic, public-domain, or otherwise safe to redistribute.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run qa:import-transition`
- [ ] Manual browser check
- [ ] Not run, because:

## Notes

Mention browser, OS, FFmpeg, media format, or migration details reviewers should know.
